verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Jehovah Jireh, my Provider, You are more than enough for me. Jehovah Rapha, You’re my Healer, By Your stripes I’ve been set free. Jehovah Shammah You are with me, You supply all my needs; You are more than enough, You are more than enough, You are more than enough for me.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Jehovah Nissi, You are my victory, You are more than enough for me. Jehovah sidkenu, my righteousness, All You are I now can be. Jehovah Ra-ah, You're my shepherd, Shalom, You are my peace. You are more than enough, So much more than enough, You are more than enough
